name: Office Building Inspection
description: Commercial office building condition assessment — includes data/telecom infrastructure and server room systems.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Grading & Drainage was inspected and appears in serviceable condition.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible, accessible components at the time of inspection.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Grading & Drainage requires repair or further evaluation by a qualified professional.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Data cabling infrastructure was inspected and appears in serviceable condition. Cable management and labeling are adequate.

information.title: Cat 6 or higher
information.comment: Data cabling is Cat 6 or higher rated, suitable for modern network requirements.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible cable runs and patch panels; in-wall and plenum cabling not fully traceable.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Data cabling shows damage, poor routing, or inadequate labeling; recommend remediation by a certified low-voltage contractor.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Data cabling presents a safety concern due to improper plenum-rated cable use or fire-stop penetrations; recommend immediate correction.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Telecommunications room was inspected and appears in serviceable condition. Demarcation point and patch panels are organized.

information.title: Adequate ventilation
information.comment: Telco room has adequate ventilation to prevent equipment overheating.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible equipment and cable management; carrier-owned equipment not assessed.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Telco room requires attention — poor cable management, insufficient grounding, or lack of surge protection observed.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Telco room presents a safety concern; recommend immediate evaluation for fire risk or electrical hazard.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Server room cooling system was inspected and appears in serviceable condition. Temperature and humidity levels are within acceptable ranges.

information.title: Redundant cooling
information.comment: Server room is equipped with redundant cooling units providing N+1 capacity.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible CRAC/CRAH units and ambient conditions; refrigerant levels and compressor internals not tested.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Server room cooling is inadequate or showing signs of failure; recommend evaluation by an HVAC specialist experienced with precision cooling.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Server room cooling failure poses risk of equipment damage and potential fire; recommend immediate remediation.

information.title: Inspection certificate
information.comment: Current elevator inspection certificate was observed and within its valid period.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Vertical transportation evaluated visually; not test-operated through full cycle. Refer to the maintenance contractor's records.

defects.title: Service needed
defects.comment: Vertical transportation requires service or further evaluation by a licensed elevator contractor.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Sidewalks, curbs, and drive aisles were inspected and appear in serviceable condition; stormwater drains freely toward designed collection points.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible surface conditions; sub-grade drainage capacity and retention pond sizing were not calculated.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Flatwork/stormwater components show cracking, ponding, or settlement; recommend repair by a qualified site contractor.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Flatwork/stormwater deficiency presents a trip or ponding safety hazard; recommend immediate correction.
